subject: Coordination brief: parrot activities around Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-7213
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-7213. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
